audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 425-427 enforce both conditions exactly as asserted: `auctionStart == 0` (never started or already ended/deleted) and `elapsedTime > assetParams.auctionDuration` (expired) both trigger `revert InvalidAuction`. AuctionStart is always set to `block.timestamp` (never future-dated), ended auctions are reset to 0 via `delete`, and `auctionDuration == 0` is blocked at config time — all gaps are closed.
